text:
promising but early.
Tip for surviving the demo with mouse: you can fake panning by Ctrl+wheel: zoom out around one point, zoom in around another.

I loved the "drag whole sub-tree" by holding Ctrl mechanic.
I think I'd want a better automatic layout (less overlap), but ultimately for me, the _reason_ to use something like this would be the freedom to lay out things manually — in a way that makes sense to me — and the sub-tree mechanic makes that more plausible...
